node_execution_guide.prompt:
Use skill sop-tg-notify to execute this downstream node.

Node Execution Guide
- Edge: youtube-fetch -> tg-notify
- Evaluation summary: Edge Handoff Instruction 已说明泛化输入的消费方式，可生成下游节点执行指导文档。
- Edge Handoff Instruction: 将metadata_file 发送到tg的群里面

Upstream artifacts
- source_url: raw/node-runs/{pipeline_id}/outputs/files/source-url.txt
- metadata_file: raw/node-runs/{pipeline_id}/outputs/files/metadata.json

Execution rules
- Use only the resolved Edge inputs and materialized artifacts listed here.
- If a required artifact cannot be read, fail before executing the downstream skill.
- Do not silently fall back to stale pipeline context or unrelated historical artifacts.
- Preserve the downstream skill boundary; this guide shapes execution but does not replace the skill.

test_plan: 记录 edge evaluation 和 guide
